headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund's Mats Hummels scored twice to guide last season's Bundesliga runners-up to a nervous 4-2 win at Freiburg on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hummels brace steers Dortmund to 4-2 away win

video.headline: Mats Hummels scores go-ahead goal to make it 3-2 Dortmund

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Mats Hummels scores go-ahead goal to make it 3-2 Dortmund) 2023/09/16 ESHEET

events.name: 1. FC Union Berlin at VfL Wolfsburg
